name: Gravl Workout Review & Optimization
description: Turn David's request plus a Gravl-provided workout into one provider-neutral Universal AI Prompt that reviews and optimizes the workout — Keep / Modify / Replace / Possibly unsafe, phase-fit, and exact Gravl-enterable changes.
inputHint: Say what you want from this workout (review it, optimize it, check it's safe). Paste the Gravl workout below, or check the screenshots box.
assumptions: David's request is required; the Gravl workout itself is optional (intake mode asks for it)
The output is one provider-neutral Universal AI Prompt — no AI is called here
DavidOS cannot read screenshots; they are attached in the AI app after copying the prompt
Medications and supplements are excluded from this prompt by default
The L4/L5 movement-safety summary is preserved whenever a back history is on file
nextAction: Copy the Universal AI Prompt, paste it into ChatGPT or Claude, and attach any Gravl screenshots there.
